since_last: 30% of 89 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.77%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 30% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.63% · BTC +2.79% · Gold +1.33% · Nasdaq100 -2.25%. 30% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.77%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.77%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -7.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -14.81%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +10.13%, ADBE +4.99%, ADBE +4.99%, ISRG +4.83%, AAPL +4.51%. Laggards: TER -14.81%, KLAC -13.76%, CEVA -12.11%, MRVL -11.70%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.35% at $158.09
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
